origin.description: Hand-written contract seed locking the -v branch's workspace-scoped negative: a -v bind whose host side is ${workspaceFolder}/data must stay SAFE (isWorkspaceScoped). C055/C060 lock broad -v binds; this locks the scoped negative so the -v extractor does not over-flag legitimate workspace mounts.

humanExpectation.rationale: The -v host side is ${workspaceFolder}/data — workspace-scoped, which looksLikeBroadPath rejects via isWorkspaceScoped. dockerVolumeHostSide extracts the host side, but it is not broad, so files.broad-path does NOT fire. Pinned image, no env → SAFE. Locks that the -v extractor honors workspace-scoping (the negative companion to C055).
knownLimitations: Synthetic minimal shape; ${workspaceFolder} is the scoped marker.
